mapper.sql: scrap_id, manager_id, device_id, approver_id, reason, approver_reason, status, created_at, approved_at
mapper.insert:
insert into scrap
scrap_id,
manager_id,
device_id,
approver_id,
reason,
approver_reason,
status,
created_at,
approved_at,
#{scrap_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{approver_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{approver_reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{approved_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update scrap
manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
approver_id = #{approver_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
approver_reason = #{approver_reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
approved_at = #{approved_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where scrap_id = #{scrap_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update scrap set manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, approver_id = #{approver_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approver_reason = #{approver_reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approved_at = #{approved_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where scrap_id = #{scrap_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
from scrap where device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '处理中'
